# .language — compiled tack dialect
# verb | tier | layer | last_gen | half_life | momentum | resolution
:boot        | 1 | kernel   | 0    | 0     | 1.00 | haystack boot
:verify      | 1 | kernel   | 0    | 0     | 1.00 | haystack verify
:init        | 1 | kernel   | 0    | 0     | 1.00 | haystack init
---BEGIN HAYSTACK.PRIME KERNEL DECLARATION---
KERNEL: @haystack.prime
VERSION: bench
AUTHORITY:
  Primary: @bench (benchmark authority)
  Kernel: @haystack.prime
---END HAYSTACK.PRIME KERNEL DECL

cmd:
cat > /workspace/.haystack/ENTITYFILE.v1 << 'EOF'
# ENTITYFILE — haystack-mint v1.3.0
entity: haystack-mint
version: 1.3.0
predecessor: haystack-mint-v1.2.0

lineage:
  - predecessor: haystack-mint-v1.2.0
  - predecessor: haystack-mint-v1.1.0

laws:
  - law: immutability — entities once attested may not be silently modified
  - law: lineage — every entity must declare its predecessor
  - law: auditability — all promotions must be recorded in audit.jsonl

attested_by: @bench
attest_method: doc pr
